meaning: n.医学,医术,泻药vt.给...服药,治愈
examples: Physic Ventures co-founder and Managing Director William Rosenzweig says the future is personalized food and health.
Its investors include Flagship Capital Partners, Polaris Venture Partners, Flybridge Capital Partners, and Physic Ventures.
Physic is looking to invest in disruptive technologies, leveraging their network of relationships with large companies to help entrepreneurs succeed more rapidly.
